analysis_summary: EV charging is evolving toward reliability and transparent user experience. Competitors emphasize speed, coverage, or sustainability but often struggle to balance all three. AuroraCharge can occupy a trust-and-clarity position with strong uptime, simple pricing, and friendly UX.

competitors.name: VoltHub
competitors.positioning: Ultra-fast urban charging in premium locations
competitors.notes: Excellent app design but limited suburban presence.

competitors.name: EcoCharge Network
strengths: Strong green credentials and community programs
weaknesses: Slower charging speeds at many sites

competitors.name: RapidZap
competitors.positioning: Speed above all; highway corridor quick-stops
competitors.notes: Strong for long-haul drivers; weak local coverage.

opportunities_for_auroracharge: Transparent uptime reporting and proactive maintenance updates
Simple, flat pricing with no hidden fees
Renewable energy matching disclosures and roadmap
Balanced network expansion across corridors and neighborhoods
differentiation_notes: Blend Explorer/Hero traits: promise freedom of movement and dependable performance, backed by clear data and friendly design.
